description: **Cross-repo auto-commit of external artifacts.** Fast-follow to COMP-PATHS-EXTERNAL. When ROADMAP/features resolve into a separate git repo (e.g. `smart-memory-docs`), the build ship step currently writes them but cannot commit them (git sees only the workspace repo). This ticket teaches ship to commit the external repo via `git -C <external>`, with safety for unrelated dirty files in that repo (stage only Compose-owned paths, never a blanket `git add -A`). Depends on COMP-PATHS-EXTERNAL.
